covered_report_window: Tuesday, July 21, 2026 after U.S. market close plus Wednesday, July 22, 2026 before U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: U.S. markets were still open at the user timestamp. The session was risk-on, with Nasdaq/semiconductor leadership rebounding after recent declines, oil near the mid-$80s, Treasury yields elevated, and investors focused on Q2 earnings quality and forward guidance.

ranked_companies.timing: Tue Jul 21 AMC, approx. 4:00 p.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Market volatility and peer brokerage strength support a positive reaction if IBKR confirms strong account, trade and margin-loan trends.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: IBD cited expected EPS growth of 25.5% and revenue growth of 21.5%; Schwab's same-day beat showed record trading and margin-loan growth.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: DARTs, accounts and margin loans beat while NII stays resilient.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A good quarter may be priced in after the YTD rally.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable from a primary free source; prior event-volatility context treated as moderate.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Brokerage peer read-through positive from Schwab; expectations already elevated.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; webcast 7:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Power-grid and AI-load demand support upside, but the stock likely needs a beat-and-raise rather than a merely good print.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Barron's cited consensus EBITDA of $1.3B on $10.8B sales and noted investor focus on order growth and a beat-and-raise.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Orders, margin and guidance validate the AI power-infrastructure thesis.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Order growth cools or guidance is merely maintained, triggering sell-the-news.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: High event-volatility risk inferred from stock's large run and options-sensitive growth setup; precise current implied move unavailable.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Recent previews emphasize very high expectations after a major rerating.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; call 8:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: A low-expectation telecom setup can work if AT&T confirms postpaid/fiber growth and free-cash-flow durability.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: IBD cited expected EPS of $0.59, revenue of $31.82B, 287K postpaid phone adds and similar broadband adds.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Adds and FCF clear the bar, with Starlink framed as limited near-term risk.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Capex intensity, broadband softness or disruptive wireless commentary dominates.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Defensive profile limits reversal risk versus high-growth names; current implied move not primary-sourced.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Consensus setup focused on subscriber KPIs and Starlink narrative rather than headline EPS alone.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; highlights 6:00 a.m. CT, call 7:30 a.m. CT
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: CME has a constructive volume setup, though much of the activity trend is visible before earnings.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Zacks/TradingView preview expected declines in top and bottom line; official timing confirmed before open.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Better fee mix, expense discipline and rate/energy/metals activity lift margins.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Known ADV and fee mix dilute surprise value.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable from primary free source; reversal risk moderate because metrics are partly observable.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Published preview flags softer expected results, creating some low-bar relief potential.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; call 8:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: AI and high-speed connectivity exposure lean positive, but auto and industrial cyclicality keep the edge below allocation threshold.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirmed fiscal Q3 results before trading begins on July 22; market likely focuses on orders, margin and transport/industrial demand mix.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: AI/data center demand offsets cyclicals and supports guidance.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Transport or industrial weakness overwhelms data-center strength.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable; cyclical mix keeps reversal risk moderate.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Evidence adequate but less estimate-specific than top names.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; call 8:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: D.R. Horton’s guide pressure and affordability headwinds create downside skew for Pulte orders and margin commentary.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Official timing confirmed before open; investors likely focus on orders, cancellations, incentives and home-sale gross margin.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Orders hold up, incentives stabilize and management frames Q2 as trough.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak orders or margin pressure validates bearish read-through.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable; low expectations keep reversal risk just below high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Same-day homebuilder read-through from D.R. Horton revenue/closing guidance pressure weighs on setup.

ranked_companies.timing: Tue Jul 21 AMC; approx. 4:05 p.m. ET, call 5:00 p.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Consumer-credit scrutiny and Discover integration costs skew negative, but a de-risked stock can rally on cleaner NCOs or cost synergy commentary.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Barron's cited adjusted EPS around $4.67, revenue near $15.77B, and investor focus on loan-loss reserves, marketing expense and net charge-offs.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: NCOs improve, reserves stabilize and integration costs look controlled.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Reserve build, charge-offs or marketing/integration expense disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investing.com reported options implied move of about 4.3% for July 21 after-close earnings.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Credit quality is the key metric, not headline EPS alone.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; call 8:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: The setup leans mildly negative on cyclical transport risk and valuation, but backlog and aftermarket strength could offset it.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Official/IR-derived sources place Q2 before market open July 22; investors will watch rail demand, margin and backlog.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Aftermarket and backlog conversion drive margin resilience.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Rail equipment demand softens or guide commentary disappoints.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable; reversal risk moderate-high due to backlog relief potential.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Evidence thinner than higher-ranked names, limiting conviction.

ranked_companies.timing: Wed Jul 22 BMO; call 9:30 a.m. ET
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Capital markets may help, but there is not enough differentiated evidence for a strong directional call.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Official timing confirmed; focus likely advisory, underwriting, wealth fees and deposit/interest spread trends.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Investment banking and wealth management activity surprise higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Compensation, deposits or advisory pipeline disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Low short-interest commentary reduces squeeze/reversal intensity.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Badger Meter has a quality utility-water theme, but evidence was too thin for an actionable directional edge.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: IR page confirms Q2 release before market open July 22; investors likely focus on municipal utility demand and margins.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Utility demand and margin resilience continue.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Valuation compression or slower orders limit upside.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Current implied move unavailable; smaller-cap liquidity raises caution.

qualified_names.why: Highest consensus score, low disparity, clear activity metric, reversal risk below 40.
Absolute score above 30, timely peer read-through, reversal risk below 40.
Clear subscriber/FCF driver, low disparity, reversal risk below 40.
Score above 30, high-quality timing evidence, low disparity, reversal risk below 40.

excluded_high_reversal_or_weak_names.reason: Score above 30 but reversal risk 52 from high expectations and valuation.
Score above 30 in absolute value but reversal risk 43 from low-bar credit relief.
Score below 30 and reversal risk above 40.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
